errors.description: The agent hallucinated the actor's name and role in Magda M., providing 'Marek' instead of the correct 'Wojciech' from the example's true answer.

The plan correctly identified the actor (Bartłomiej Kasprzykowski) and his role in Magda M., but the execution produced an incorrect first name, indicating a deviation from the task's goal.
errors.description: The agent failed to adhere to the task's requirement to extract the first name of the character played in Magda M., instead providing an unrelated name ('Marek') despite correct intermediate steps.
